howItWorks.intro: This ph buffer solution calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Henderson-Hasselbalch
rules.explanation: Fundamental equation for buffer pH calculation.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: pH = pKa + log([A-]/[HA]), relating pH to the ratio of conjugate base to weak acid.
Buffers work best within ±1 pH unit of the pKa value.
